metadata.description: JHoraAI Master Career and Professional Life Knowledge Base and Event Dossier

categories.description: All events, transitions, growth phases, professional choices, and milestones in a native's career and business life

events.description: The absolute entry of a native into professional work, signifying the first generation of independent livelihood
The official signing and joining date of the first employment contract
Securing public sector or civil service employment under state or federal authority, heavily signified by Sun, Jupiter, and the 10th house
Employment within private corporate entities, commercial firms, or non-governmental structures
Fixed-term professional assignments or project-based agreements without permanent corporate liability
Short-term seasonal or transitional employment role to fulfill urgent livelihood requirements
Tenured, stable, and indefinite employment offering structured social benefits and long-term security, signified by Saturn's strong alignment
Elevation in rank, status, and authority along with professional scale progression, signified by positive linkages of 2, 6, 10, 11 houses
Reduction in professional rank, scale, or authority, usually triggered by active 5, 8, 12 house significations overriding the 10th
Geographical or departmental relocation of workplace within the same employment setup, signified by the 3rd, 4th, and 12th houses
Shift in functional workflow or internal team structure without changing the overall employer
Transformation of operational profile, core responsibilities, or title within the professional environment
Direct enhancement in financial compensation, wages, or performance commissions, indicating strong 2nd and 11th house sub lords
Decrease in financial compensation, structural paycuts, or loss of allowances, signified by 12th house (loss) operating on 2nd and 11th
Public acknowledgment, industry praise, or professional appreciation from peers and superiors
Formal, high-status prizes, physical medals, or trophies representing ultimate merit, signified by Jupiter aspecting Sun or the 11th house
Standard seasonal, quarterly, or annual corporate evaluation of the native's work metrics
Assuming team leadership, directional charge, or project ownership responsibilities, signifying strong Mars and Sun dignities
Progression into mid-to-high corporate managerial cadres, driving resource allocation and strategy
Reaching high-level executive ranks (C-Suite, VP, Director) with absolute authority, signified by strong 10th and 1st house lords in mutual linkage
Voluntary release of active employment by the native, typically signified by 5th and 9th houses (giving up 6th and 10th)
Involuntary dismissal or discharge of employment due to corporate decisions, performance issues, or conflicts
Mass corporate downsizing or structural redundancies, indicated by sudden outer planetary transits conjunct natal 10th/6th points
A prolonged sabbatical, educational pause, health leave, or maternal/paternal timeout from work
Re-entering active professional workflows after a substantial career break, sabbatical, or pause
A total pivot in industry, functional field, or profession (e.g., from Engineering to Art), indicating heavy 8th or 5th house activation
Sustained upward progression, skill acquisition, expanding authority, and financial milestones in current career track
Phase of stagnant options, performance blockages, declining opportunities, or loss of relevance in current industry
Closing down self-employed business operations to resume secure salary employment, indicating the 6th house overriding the 7th and 10th
Resigning from salary employment to start an independent business, commercial startup, or freelance agency (7th and 10th house strength)
Working in a foreign country or cross-border location, heavily signified by the 9th and 12th houses linked with 10th and 1st
Working from home or digital nomad settings, showing link of the 4th house (home) with 10th/6th houses
Working as an independent self-employed contractor delivering specialized services, indicated by Rahu/Uranus or strong 3rd house
Delivering strategic advice, consultation, or knowledge-base counsel, signified by strong Jupiter and Mercury placements
Formal exit from active professional careers due to age brackets or financial freedom, showing the detachment of 10th and 6th houses
Securing professional assignments, post-retirement advisory posts, or new employment contracts after formal retirement

natalPromise.description: Evaluation of career and income promises via cuspal sub-lords of the 10th and 11th houses

cusps.description: Cuspal coordinates, degrees, and sign/star/sub/sub-sub lords

houseLords.description: Rulers of signs occupying the cuspal degrees of the 12 houses

houseOccupants.description: Planets residing inside the boundary degrees of relevant houses

starLords.description: Constellation rulers governing planet positions and cuspal points

subLords.description: Sub-divisional rulers of stellar spaces determining final outcome event trends in KP

subSubLords.description: Micro-sub divisional rulers of sub spaces for hyper-precise timing

planetSignificators.description: Planetary significators categorized by A, B, C, D grades in KP system

houseSignificators.description: List of planets signifying specific houses sorted by strength

retrograde.description: Planetary backward motion indicators causing delays or repeating situations

combust.description: Planets in close proximity to the Sun losing their explicit outward strength

conjunction.description: Close longitudinal alignment of planets within orb values

aspect.description: Planetary aspects on houses and other planets according to Vedic degrees

bhukti.description: Vimshottari Bhukti lord role in timing

antara.description: Vimshottari Antara lord role in timing

sookshma.description: Vimshottari Sookshma lord role in timing

prana.description: Vimshottari Prana lord role in timing

currentTransit.description: Current moving planets conjuncting or aspecting natal significator degrees

moonTransit.description: Daily trigger verification based on transiting Moon over key Nakshatras

saturnTransit.description: Macro-structural trends, delays, and career structural lessons

jupiterTransit.description: Blessing, expansion, and career event sanctioning

rulingPlanets.description: Ascendant Sign/Star Lord, Moon Sign/Star Lord, and Day Lord computed for query hour

horarySupport.description: KP Horary (Prasna) support based on a number from 1 to 249

supportingEvidence.description: Positive linkages where 10th sub lord signifies 2, 6, 10, 11 and active DBA lords are positive significators

conflictingEvidence.description: Negative linkages where 10th sub lord signifies 5, 8, 12 and active DBA lords signify loss or stagnation

missingEvidence.description: Inability to verify precise sub-lords due to birth time uncertainty beyond 1 minute

d1.description: Rashi (Natal) Chart analysis of career houses and planets

d10.description: Dasamsha Chart - the core divisional chart representing profession, success, and status

d9.description: Navamsha Chart - inner strengths, dignity, and career partner fortunes

tenthHouse.description: Evaluation of the 10th house in D1 and D10 for occupants, aspects, and structural strength

sixthHouse.description: Service, routine jobs, competitive success, and daily tasks

secondHouse.description: Financial reserves, wealth accumulation, and speech

eleventhHouse.description: Income, gains, social networks, and professional success

sun.description: Natural significator (Karaka) of authority, status, and government

saturn.description: Natural significator (Karaka) of service, hard labor, duties, and persistence

mercury.description: Natural significator (Karaka) of intellect, business, trade, and communication

jupiter.description: Natural significator (Karaka) of wisdom, expansion, counseling, and corporate heights

mars.description: Natural significator (Karaka) of ambition, enterprise, military, and engineering

yogas.description: Planetary combinations like Amala Yoga, Raja Yoga, or Pancha Mahapurusha Yoga

doshas.description: Afflictions like Kemadruma Dosha, Shakat Dosha, or Rahu-Ketu axis afflictions

vimshottari.description: 120-year planetary dasha sequence showing professional evolution

transit.description: Transits of Saturn and Jupiter activating the 10th, 6th, or Ascendant

supportingEvidence.description: Strong 10th lord in kendra/trikona, benefic aspects on D1/D10 10th house, unafflicted Sun/Saturn

conflictingEvidence.description: Afflicted 10th house by multiple malefics, debilitated Sun, 10th lord in 8th house

atmakaraka.description: The planet with the highest longitudinal degree representing the soul's primary lessons

amatyakaraka.description: The planet with the second-highest longitudinal degree representing the career, status, and professional guide

karakamsha.description: The sign occupied by the Atmakaraka in the Navamsha chart analyzed in D1

arudhaA10.description: Rajyapada (A10) - the arudha of the 10th house representing public status and career success

argala.description: Interventions or direct supports from planets in 2nd, 4th, 5th, and 11th from significator points

rashiDrishti.description: Sign aspects where cardinal signs aspect fixed signs and mutable signs aspect each other

charaDasha.description: Jaimini sign-based dasha sequence timing critical career events

supportingEvidence.description: Benefic planets in or aspecting A10, clean aspect links between Amatyakaraka and career houses

conflictingEvidence.description: Malefics like Rahu or Saturn occupying or aspecting A10, afflicted Amatyakaraka

mc.description: Medium Coeli (Midheaven) - the cusp of the 10th house representing professional zenith, public status, and career legacy

tenthHouse.description: Cusp, sign, and planets residing in the 10th house

saturn.description: Planet of structured careers, duty, corporate hierarchy, boundaries, and long-term milestones

sun.description: Planet of ego expression, leadership, vitality, and creative career drive

mars.description: Planet of ambition, competitive action, and enterprise in profession

jupiter.description: Planet of professional expansion, abundance, higher learning, and international jobs

progressions.description: Secondary progressions showing professional and psychological timeline shifts

solarReturn.description: Annual return of the Sun to its birth degree, highlighting the professional theme of the year

transits.description: Outer planets aspecting MC or natal 10th/6th house rulers

careerRules.description: Bhrigu Nandi Nadi rules: Saturn representing career, Mercury representing business, Mars representing engineering

professionalTiming.description: Timing via Saturn's transit over nakshatras and sign elements conjuncting key planets

supportingEvidence.description: Harmonious transit paths of Saturn without malefic node intersections

relevantHouses.description: Houses 2, 6, and 10 evaluated using unique Lal Kitab aspects

professionalRemedies.description: Symbolic actions, charity, or domestic habits to rectify professional blockages

sleepingPlanets.description: Planets in inactive houses that require manual triggers to awaken

muntha.description: The progressed yearly point in the Varshaphala (annual) chart

varshaphala.description: The annual Solar Return chart calculated under Vedic Tajik rules

annualTrigger.description: Timing via Patyini Dasha or Mudda Dasha conjunct with transit aspects

phases.description: Historical career events, retro-active verification, and previous milestones
Current active career energies, transits, and short-term trends
Short-term project completions, interviews, and immediate reviews
Medium-term transitions, performance review cycles, and team shifts
Half-yearly goals, contract evaluations, and potential promotions
Annual appraisal, salary increment cycle, and major planetary transits
Significant career changes, business growth, or executive transitions
Long-term legacy building, retirement timelines, or major structural shifts
Fundamental natal promise, overall status potential, and macro-career evolution

pipeline.description: Confirm primary user profile and secondary partners if relevant

pipeline.description: Verify calculation engines for selected systems are loaded

pipeline.name: Natal Promise
pipeline.description: Analyze fundamental life promise across KP cusps and Parashari houses

pipeline.name: Career Promise
pipeline.description: Check professional strength specifically using 10th and 11th cusps and D10 charts

pipeline.name: Planet Validation
pipeline.description: Evaluate strength, dignity, and associations of significators

pipeline.name: House Validation
pipeline.description: Assess relevant house strengths, cuspal sub lords, and aspects

pipeline.name: Dasha Validation
pipeline.description: Examine Vimshottari and Chara dasha support for the timeframe

pipeline.name: Transit Validation
pipeline.description: Track current and upcoming transit triggers over key degrees

pipeline.name: Evidence Package
pipeline.description: Compile structured output organizing all Supporting, Conflicting, and Missing indicators

pipeline.name: AI Ready
pipeline.description: Payload is complete and ready to relay to AI engine

types.description: Connectivity between a cusp sub-lord and the significator houses
Strength of 10th lord or career significator in the D10 chart
Jaimini sign-aspect connectivity between Amatyakaraka and the lagna/arudha points

weightingSystem.description: Algorithmic weights for matching patterns across multiple astrological disciplines

promotionWindow.title: Upcoming Promotion Opportunity Window
promotionWindow.description: Fired when active dasha and transit elements align favorably with the 10th and 11th cusps

transferAlert.title: Job Transfer/Relocation Trigger Alert
transferAlert.description: Fired when planetary transits activate the 3rd and 12th houses concurrently

careerOpportunity.title: General Career Opportunity Window
careerOpportunity.description: Fired when favorable Jupiter transits or new bhukti periods commence

interviewWindow.title: Auspicious Interview and Negotiation Window
interviewWindow.description: Fired when the Moon transits over the nakshatra of the 6th or 10th sub lord

jobChangeWindow.title: Auspicious Job Transition Window
jobChangeWindow.description: Fired during 5th, 9th, or 10th house activations indicating a smooth employer change

governmentOpportunity.title: Civil Service/Government Job Alert
governmentOpportunity.description: Fired when Sun and Jupiter transits aspect the 10th house of public authority

foreignJobWindow.title: Foreign Employment/Sponsorship Opportunity Alert
foreignJobWindow.description: Fired when 12th house elements are activated alongside career lords
